dialog.description: Tell us what's working, what's not, or what you'd like to see. Goes straight to the team.
dialog.title: Send feedback

fields.includeDiagnosticsHelp: Adds your browser, screen size, app version, and the URL you're on. Helpful for bug reports.
fields.messagePlaceholder: What happened? What were you trying to do? The more detail, the better.
fields.replyToHelp: We'll use this address if we need to follow up. Leave blank to send a one-way note.

toasts.error: Couldn't send your feedback. Please try again.
toasts.notConfigured: Feedback isn't configured on this deployment. Please email support directly.
toasts.rateLimited: You've sent a lot of feedback recently. Please try again in a few minutes.

validation.messageTooLong: Message is too long. Please trim it to under 5 KB.
validation.replyToInvalid: Enter a valid email address or leave this blank.
